functions.name: addAISearchTool
functions.description: Adds an Azure AI Search tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to ground their responses using data from an Azure AI Search index.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: Optional name of the search index to query. If not specified, the agent must be told which index to use.

functions.name: addAzureFunctionTool
functions.description: Adds an Azure Function tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to invoke a serverless Azure Function with queue-based input/output bindings.
functions.signature: addAzureFunctionTool(name: string, functionName: string, description: string, parametersJson: string, inputQueueEndpoint: string, inputQueueName: string, outputQueueEndpoint: string, outputQueueName: string): AzureFunctionToolResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

parameters.name: functionName
parameters.description: The name of the Azure Function.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description of what the function does.

parameters.name: parametersJson
parameters.description: The JSON schema defining the function parameters as a JSON string.

parameters.name: inputQueueEndpoint
parameters.description: The Azure Storage Queue endpoint for input binding.

parameters.name: inputQueueName
parameters.description: The queue name for input binding.

parameters.name: outputQueueEndpoint
parameters.description: The Azure Storage Queue endpoint for output binding.

parameters.name: outputQueueName
parameters.description: The queue name for output binding.

functions.name: addBingGroundingConnection
functions.description: Adds a Grounding with Bing Search connection to a Microsoft Foundry project.
functions.remarks:
The Bing Search resource (`Microsoft.Bing/accounts`) cannot be provisioned through Aspire
or Bicep. It must be created manually in the
Azure portal.
Once the Bing resource exists, pass its resource ID to this method. The connection is
created in the Foundry project using API key authentication with
`category: "ApiKey"` and `metadata.Type: "bing_grounding"`.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the connection resource.

parameters.name: bingResourceId
parameters.description: The full Azure resource ID of the Bing Search resource (e.g., `/subscriptions/{subId}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.Bing/accounts/{name}`).

functions.name: addBingGroundingConnectionFromParameter
functions.description: Adds a Grounding with Bing Search connection to a Microsoft Foundry project using a parameter resource for the Bing resource ID.
functions.remarks:
This overload allows the Bing resource ID to be supplied as a parameter (e.g., from user secrets
or configuration) rather than a hardcoded string. The parameter value is resolved at deployment time
and embedded in the Bicep template.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the connection resource.

parameters.name: bingResourceId
parameters.description: A parameter resource containing the full Azure resource ID of the Bing Search resource.

functions.name: addBingGroundingTool
functions.description: Adds a Bing Grounding tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to ground their responses using Bing Search results.
functions.remarks:
After creating the tool, call one of the `WithReference` overloads
to link it to a Bing Search resource.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

functions.name: addCapabilityHost
functions.description: Adds a capability host to the Microsoft Foundry project.
functions.returns: A reference to the project builder for chaining capability host configuration.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the capability host.

functions.name: addCodeInterpreterTool
functions.description: Adds a Code Interpreter tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to write and run Python code in a sandboxed environment for data analysis, math, and chart generation.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

functions.name: addComputerUseTool
functions.description: Adds a Computer Use tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to interact with a computer desktop by taking screenshots, moving the mouse, clicking, and typing.
functions.signature: addComputerUseTool(name: string, displayWidth?: number, displayHeight?: number, environment?: string): ComputerToolResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

parameters.name: displayWidth
parameters.description: The width of the display in pixels.

parameters.name: displayHeight
parameters.description: The height of the display in pixels.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.description: The environment identifier. Defaults to "browser".

functions.name: addConnection
functions.description: Adds a connection to a Microsoft Foundry project.

functions.name: addContainerRegistryConnection
functions.description: Adds a container registry connection to the Microsoft Foundry project.

functions.name: addCosmosConnection
functions.description: Adds CosmosDB to a project as a connection

functions.name: addDeployment
functions.description: Adds a Microsoft Foundry deployment resource to a Microsoft Foundry resource.
functions.signature: addDeployment(name: string, model: FoundryModel|string, modelVersion?: string, format?: string): FoundryDeploymentResource

functions.name: addFabricTool
functions.description: Adds a Microsoft Fabric data agent tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to query data through Fabric data agents.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

parameters.name: projectConnectionIds
parameters.description: The Foundry project connection IDs for the Fabric data agents.

functions.name: addFileSearchTool
functions.description: Adds a File Search tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to search uploaded files and proprietary documents using vector search.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

parameters.name: vectorStoreIds
parameters.description: Optional vector store IDs to search. If empty, the agent's default stores are used.

functions.name: addFoundry
functions.description: Adds a Microsoft Foundry resource to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

functions.name: addFunctionTool
functions.description: Adds a function calling tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to call application-defined functions with structured parameters.
functions.signature: addFunctionTool(name: string, functionName: string, parametersJson: string, description?: string, strictModeEnabled?: boolean): FunctionToolResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

parameters.name: functionName
parameters.description: The name of the function.

parameters.name: parametersJson
parameters.description: The JSON schema defining the function parameters as a JSON string.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description of what the function does.

parameters.name: strictModeEnabled
parameters.description: Whether to enable strict mode for parameter validation.

functions.name: addImageGenerationTool
functions.description: Adds an Image Generation tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to generate and edit images.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

functions.name: addKeyVaultConnection
functions.description: Adds a Key Vault connection to the Microsoft Foundry project.
functions.remarks:
This connection allows the Microsoft Foundry project to store secrets for various other connections.
As such, we recommend adding this connection *before* any others, so that those connections
can leverage the Key Vault connection for secret storage.

functions.name: addModelDeployment
functions.description: Adds a model deployment to the parent Microsoft Foundry resource.
functions.signature: addModelDeployment(name: string, model: FoundryModel|string, modelVersion?: string, format?: string): FoundryDeploymentResource

functions.name: addProject
functions.description: Adds a Microsoft Foundry project resource to the application model. This will also attach the project as a deployment target for agents.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Microsoft Foundry project resource.

functions.name: addPromptAgent
functions.description: Adds a prompt agent to a Microsoft Foundry project with the specified tools.
functions.remarks:
Prompt agents are always deployed to Azure Foundry, even during local development
(`aspire run`). Local services communicate with the cloud-provisioned agent
using the project endpoint and agent name injected as environment variables.
Tools are project-level resources created with `Add*Tool` methods and can be
reused across multiple agents in the same project.
functions.signature: addPromptAgent(name: string, model: FoundryDeploymentResource, instructions?: string): AzurePromptAgentResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the prompt agent. This will be the agent name in Foundry.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model deployment to use for this agent.

parameters.name: instructions
parameters.description: Optional system instructions for the agent.

functions.name: addSearchConnection
functions.description: Adds an Azure AI Search connection to a Microsoft Foundry project.

functions.name: addSharePointTool
functions.description: Adds a SharePoint grounding tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to search data from SharePoint sites configured as Foundry project connections.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

parameters.name: projectConnectionIds
parameters.description: The Foundry project connection IDs for the SharePoint sites.

functions.name: addStorageConnection
functions.description: Adds an Azure Storage account to a project as a connection.

functions.name: addWebSearchTool
functions.description: Adds a Web Search tool to a Microsoft Foundry project, enabling agents to retrieve real-time information from the public web and return answers with inline citations.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the tool resource.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the ConnectionStringExpression property

functions.name: description
functions.description: Gets or sets a description of the agent.

functions.name: instructions
functions.description: Gets or sets the system instructions for the agent.

functions.name: metadata
functions.description: Gets the metadata to associate with the agent.

functions.name: model
functions.description: Gets or sets the model deployment name used by this agent.

functions.name: setDescription
functions.description: Gets or sets a description of the agent.

functions.name: setInstructions
functions.description: Gets or sets the system instructions for the agent.

functions.name: setModel
functions.description: Gets or sets the model deployment name used by this agent.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Microsoft Foundry resource with model/deployment information.

functions.name: deploymentName
functions.description: Gets or sets the name of the deployment.
functions.remarks:
This defaults to `ModelName`, but allows for a different deployment name in Azure.
When using Foundry Local, this is the model id.

functions.name: format
functions.description: Gets or sets the format of deployment model.

functions.name: modelName
functions.description: Gets or sets the name of the model.

functions.name: modelVersion
functions.description: Gets or sets the version of the model.

functions.name: parent
functions.description: Gets the parent Microsoft Foundry resource.

functions.name: setDeploymentName
functions.description: Gets or sets the name of the deployment.
functions.remarks:
This defaults to `ModelName`, but allows for a different deployment name in Azure.
When using Foundry Local, this is the model id.

functions.name: setFormat
functions.description: Gets or sets the format of deployment model.

functions.name: setModelName
functions.description: Gets or sets the name of the model.

functions.name: setModelVersion
functions.description: Gets or sets the version of the model.

functions.name: setParent
functions.description: Gets the parent Microsoft Foundry resource.

functions.name: setSkuCapacity
functions.description: Gets or sets the capacity of the SKU, in thousands of tokens per minute (TPM).
functions.remarks:
For example, a value of 10 means 10,000 tokens per minute. Exceeding this rate
limit results in HTTP 429 responses. See
Azure AI quota management
for more information.

functions.name: setSkuName
functions.description: Gets or sets the name of the SKU.

functions.name: skuCapacity
functions.description: Gets or sets the capacity of the SKU, in thousands of tokens per minute (TPM).
functions.remarks:
For example, a value of 10 means 10,000 tokens per minute. Exceeding this rate
limit results in HTTP 429 responses. See
Azure AI quota management
for more information.

functions.name: skuName
functions.description: Gets or sets the name of the SKU.

functions.name: cpu
functions.description: CPU allocation for each hosted agent instance, in vCPU cores.

functions.name: description
functions.description: The description of the hosted agent.

functions.name: environmentVariables
functions.description: Environment variables to set in the hosted agent container.

functions.name: memory
functions.description: Memory allocation for each hosted agent instance, in GiB. Must be 2x the CPU allocation.

functions.name: metadata
functions.description: Additional metadata to associate with the hosted agent.

functions.name: setCpu
functions.description: CPU allocation for each hosted agent instance, in vCPU cores.

functions.name: setDescription
functions.description: The description of the hosted agent.

functions.name: setMemory
functions.description: Memory allocation for each hosted agent instance, in GiB. Must be 2x the CPU allocation.

functions.name: runAsFoundryLocal
functions.description: Adds a Foundry Local resource to the distributed application builder.
functions.returns: A resource builder for the Foundry Local resource.

functions.name: withAppInsights
functions.description: Adds an Application Insights resource to the Microsoft Foundry project, overriding the default (which is to create a new Application Insights resource).

parameters.name: appInsights
parameters.description: The Application Insights resource to associate with the project.

functions.name: withCapabilityHost
functions.description: Associates a supported resource with a capability host on a Microsoft Foundry project.
functions.returns: A reference to the project builder for chaining capability host configuration.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The supported capability host resource.

functions.name: asHostedAgent
functions.description: Configures the resource to run and publish as a hosted agent in Microsoft Foundry, targeting the specified Foundry project.
functions.remarks:
In run mode, this configures the resource with a hosted-agent endpoint, dashboard command,
and OpenTelemetry settings. In publish mode, the resource is deployed as a hosted agent
in Microsoft Foundry.

functions.name: withFoundryRoleAssignments
functions.description: Assigns the specified roles to the given resource, granting it the necessary permissions on the target Microsoft Foundry resource. This replaces the default role assignments for the resource.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target Microsoft Foundry resource.

parameters.name: roles
parameters.description: The Microsoft Foundry roles to be assigned (for example, `CognitiveServicesOpenAIUser`).

functions.name: withKeyVault
functions.description: Adds a Key Vault connection to the Microsoft Foundry project.

parameters.name: keyVault
parameters.description: The Key Vault resource to associate with the project.

functions.name: withProperties
functions.description: Allows setting the properties of a Microsoft Foundry Deployment resource.

parameters.name: configure
parameters.description: A method that can be used for customizing the `FoundryDeploymentResource`.

functions.name: withReference
functions.description: Links an Azure AI Search tool to a backing search resource.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: The Azure AI Search resource to use for grounding.

functions.description: Links a Bing Grounding tool to a Bing Search resource or connection.

parameters.description: The tool resource to attach to this agent.

handleTypes.name: AzureFunctionToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that enables an agent to invoke an Azure Function.
handleTypes.remarks:
Azure Functions tools allow agents to call serverless functions as tools.
The function definition includes the function name, parameters schema,
and input/output bindings for Azure Storage queues.

handleTypes.name: AzurePromptAgentResource
handleTypes.description: Represents a Microsoft Foundry prompt agent resource that is provisioned on Azure.
handleTypes.remarks:
Unlike hosted agents (which run as containers), prompt agents are configuration-only
agents defined by a model, system instructions, and optional tools. They are always
deployed to Azure Foundry via the data plane API, even during local development
(`aspire run`). Local services communicate with the cloud-provisioned agent
using the Foundry project endpoint and agent name.

capabilities.name: connectionStringExpression
capabilities.description: Gets the ConnectionStringExpression property

capabilities.name: description
capabilities.description: Gets or sets a description of the agent.

capabilities.name: instructions
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the system instructions for the agent.

capabilities.name: metadata
capabilities.description: Gets the metadata to associate with the agent.

capabilities.name: model
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the model deployment name used by this agent.

capabilities.name: setDescription
capabilities.description: Gets or sets a description of the agent.

capabilities.name: setInstructions
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the system instructions for the agent.

capabilities.name: setModel
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the model deployment name used by this agent.

capabilities.name: withTool
capabilities.description: Adds a tool to a prompt agent.

parameters.name: tool
parameters.description: The tool resource to attach to this agent.

handleTypes.name: BingGroundingConnectionResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry project connection resource specifically for Grounding with Bing Search connections.
handleTypes.remarks:
This type is used to distinguish Bing grounding connections from other connection types,
ensuring that only connections created by `AddBingGroundingConnection`
can be linked to a `BingGroundingToolResource`.

handleTypes.name: BingGroundingToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that grounds an agent's responses using Bing Search.

capabilities.name: withReference
capabilities.description: Links a Bing Grounding tool to a Bing Search resource or connection.

handleTypes.name: CodeInterpreterToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that enables an agent to write and run Python code in a sandboxed environment for data analysis, math, and chart generation.
handleTypes.remarks:
This tool requires no Azure provisioning or project connections.
It is automatically available in all Foundry projects.

handleTypes.name: ComputerToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that enables an agent to interact with a computer desktop by taking screenshots, moving the mouse, clicking, and typing.
handleTypes.remarks: The computer tool requires specifying the display dimensions and environment.

handleTypes.name: FabricToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that enables an agent to query data using a Microsoft Fabric data agent.
handleTypes.remarks:
Fabric connections must be configured in the Foundry project beforehand.
This tool references existing connections by their Foundry project connection IDs.

handleTypes.name: FileSearchToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that enables an agent to search uploaded files and proprietary documents using vector search.
handleTypes.remarks:
This tool requires no Azure provisioning or project connections.
Vector store IDs can optionally be configured for specific document collections.

capabilities.name: connectionStringExpression
capabilities.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Microsoft Foundry resource with model/deployment information.

capabilities.name: deploymentName
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the name of the deployment.
capabilities.remarks:
This defaults to `ModelName`, but allows for a different deployment name in Azure.
When using Foundry Local, this is the model id.

capabilities.name: format
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the format of deployment model.

capabilities.name: modelName
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the name of the model.

capabilities.name: modelVersion
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the version of the model.

capabilities.name: parent
capabilities.description: Gets the parent Microsoft Foundry resource.

capabilities.name: setDeploymentName
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the name of the deployment.
capabilities.remarks:
This defaults to `ModelName`, but allows for a different deployment name in Azure.
When using Foundry Local, this is the model id.

capabilities.name: setFormat
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the format of deployment model.

capabilities.name: setModelName
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the name of the model.

capabilities.name: setModelVersion
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the version of the model.

capabilities.name: setParent
capabilities.description: Gets the parent Microsoft Foundry resource.

capabilities.name: setSkuCapacity
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the capacity of the SKU, in thousands of tokens per minute (TPM).
capabilities.remarks:
For example, a value of 10 means 10,000 tokens per minute. Exceeding this rate
limit results in HTTP 429 responses. See
Azure AI quota management
for more information.

capabilities.name: setSkuName
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the name of the SKU.

capabilities.name: skuCapacity
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the capacity of the SKU, in thousands of tokens per minute (TPM).
capabilities.remarks:
For example, a value of 10 means 10,000 tokens per minute. Exceeding this rate
limit results in HTTP 429 responses. See
Azure AI quota management
for more information.

capabilities.name: skuName
capabilities.description: Gets or sets the name of the SKU.

capabilities.name: withProperties
capabilities.description: Allows setting the properties of a Microsoft Foundry Deployment resource.

parameters.name: configure
parameters.description: A method that can be used for customizing the `FoundryDeploymentResource`.

handleTypes.name: FoundryResource
handleTypes.description: Represents a Microsoft Foundry resource. This corresponds to the Azure Cognitive Services account with Microsoft Foundry capabilities enabled.

capabilities.name: addDeployment
capabilities.description: Adds a Microsoft Foundry deployment resource to a Microsoft Foundry resource.
capabilities.signature: addDeployment(name: string, model: FoundryModel|string, modelVersion?: string, format?: string): FoundryDeploymentResource

capabilities.name: addProject
capabilities.description: Adds a Microsoft Foundry project resource to the application model. This will also attach the project as a deployment target for agents.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Microsoft Foundry project resource.

capabilities.name: runAsFoundryLocal
capabilities.description: Adds a Foundry Local resource to the distributed application builder.
capabilities.returns: A resource builder for the Foundry Local resource.

handleTypes.name: FoundryToolResource
handleTypes.description: Base class for Foundry tool resources that participate in the Aspire application model.
handleTypes.remarks:
All Foundry tools are modeled as project-level resources, enabling dashboard visibility,
reusability across agents, and consistent lifecycle management. Create tool instances using
the `Add*Tool` extension methods on `AzureCognitiveServicesProjectResource`.

handleTypes.name: FunctionToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that enables an agent to call a user-defined function.
handleTypes.remarks:
Function calling tools allow agents to invoke functions defined by the application.
The agent decides when to call the function based on the function name, description,
and parameter schema, then returns a structured function call request that the
application handles.

handleTypes.name: HostedAgentConfiguration
handleTypes.description: A configuration helper for hosted agents.
handleTypes.remarks:
This type is used instead of `ProjectsAgentVersionCreationOptions` to provide a strongly typed
configuration surface for hosted agent definitions. When used from polyglot app hosts, only the
ATS-compatible properties are exported; Azure SDK-specific members remain .NET-only.

capabilities.name: cpu
capabilities.description: CPU allocation for each hosted agent instance, in vCPU cores.

capabilities.name: description
capabilities.description: The description of the hosted agent.

capabilities.name: environmentVariables
capabilities.description: Environment variables to set in the hosted agent container.

capabilities.name: memory
capabilities.description: Memory allocation for each hosted agent instance, in GiB. Must be 2x the CPU allocation.

capabilities.name: metadata
capabilities.description: Additional metadata to associate with the hosted agent.

capabilities.name: setCpu
capabilities.description: CPU allocation for each hosted agent instance, in vCPU cores.

capabilities.name: setDescription
capabilities.description: The description of the hosted agent.

capabilities.name: setMemory
capabilities.description: Memory allocation for each hosted agent instance, in GiB. Must be 2x the CPU allocation.

handleTypes.name: ImageGenerationToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that enables an agent to generate and edit images.

handleTypes.name: SharePointToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that grounds an agent's responses using SharePoint data.
handleTypes.remarks:
SharePoint connections must be configured in the Foundry project beforehand.
This tool references existing connections by their Foundry project connection IDs.

handleTypes.name: WebSearchToolResource
handleTypes.description: A Foundry tool resource that retrieves real-time information from the public web and returns answers with inline citations.
handleTypes.remarks:
This is the recommended way to add web grounding to an agent.
No Azure provisioning is required — the tool is provided by the Foundry Agent Service.

dtoTypes.name: FoundryModel
dtoTypes.description: Describes a model that can be deployed to Microsoft Foundry.

fields.name: Format
fields.description: The format or provider of the model (e.g., OpenAI, Microsoft, xAi, Deepseek).

memberDocs.name: CognitiveServicesOpenAIContributor
memberDocs.description: Allows full management of Azure OpenAI resources.

memberDocs.name: CognitiveServicesOpenAIUser
memberDocs.description: Allows using Azure OpenAI models for inference.

memberDocs.name: CognitiveServicesUser
memberDocs.description: Allows access to Azure Cognitive Services resources.
